question: the way to help yourself think about hard questions step by step
expected_answer:
When you want to understand something that is hard to know, you must take it one small step at a time. You cannot look at the whole thing at once because it is too big and too heavy for your mind to carry. Instead, you must break the big thing into many tiny things. You look at the first tiny thing and try to see it well. Then you look at the next tiny thing. You do this until you have looked at all the tiny things. This way, you do not get lost in the big thing.

The hard question is this. How do we know if the way we are thinking is good or bad? How do we know if we are moving in the right way or if we are just moving in circles? If we break a big thing into small things, we might still be wrong about the small things. If the small things are wrong, then the whole thing will be wrong when we put it back together.

Some people say that the best way is to look for what is true in every small thing. They say you must find things that cannot be taken away. They want to find a bottom part that is strong and will not move. They think if they build their thoughts on these strong things, the whole house of thought will stay up. They believe that if you are very careful with each small part, the whole thing must be right.

Other people say that we can never be sure about the small things. They say that everything we think might be wrong in some way. These people think it is better to look at how the small things work together to make a whole. They do not care if one small thing is not true in every single way. They care if the way the small things act makes sense for the whole thing. They look at how things move and change. They believe that if the whole thing works well in the world, then the way we thought about it is good enough.

question: the idea that the right thing to do is what leads to the most good
expected_answer:
Person number one: I want to know about the idea that we should do what makes the most good for all people.

Person number two: Yes. It is the thought that when you must choose between two ways to act, you should pick the way that brings the most good feeling or well being to the most people.

Person number one: How do we know which way is the best way?

Person number two: You must look at every choice. You must think about how much good feeling or how much hurt each choice will bring to every person. Then you pick the one that has the most good feeling and the least hurt.

Person number one: What if a choice makes one person very sad but makes many other people a little bit happy?

Person number two: That is a hard thing. You must do the counting in your head. You must see if the whole part of the good feeling is bigger than the whole part of the sad feeling. If the good feeling is bigger, then that is the right thing to do.

Person number one: Is it always right to do this? What if we have to do something bad to someone to help many others?

Person number two: Some people say yes, and some people say no. Those who say yes think that the whole part of the good is what matters most. Those who say no think that some things are always wrong, no matter how much good they might bring to others.

question: why sharing all you know is not always the best move
expected_answer:
When you know something, it is a part of you. You might think that giving all your thoughts and all your ways of doing things to everyone is a good thing. You might think that if everyone knows everything, the whole world will be better. But there are many reasons why this is not always the best way to act.

First, think about how people use what they know. Some people are good, but some people are not. If you give a way to make something that can do very much to someone who wants to hurt others, you have made a bad thing happen. You cannot know for sure how another person will use your thoughts. If you keep some things to yourself, you can make sure those things are only used to help.

Second, think about how much work it takes to learn something. It takes a long time to learn a hard way to do a thing. If you give that way away too fast, people might not think it is a big thing. They might not see how hard it was to find. Also, if everyone knows the way, no one will feel the need to work hard to find a new way. New ideas come when people try to find an answer to a problem that no one else has found an answer to yet. If the answer is already out there for everyone, the search for new ways might stop.

Third, think about how your own mind works. When you have a thought that is only for you, you can work on it. You can make it better and more able to do things. If you give it away before it is ready, it might be a thought that has no power. It might be a thought that has things in it that are not right. If you wait until you are sure it is good, you can share it with much more power.

Finally, there is the matter of how we live with each other. In a group of people, we often have things that are special to us. These things make us who we are. If we give everything away, we might lose the things that make us different and special. Having some things that belong only to you allows you to have a place that is your own. This helps you stay strong as a person. Because of this, being careful about what you share is a way to be someone who thinks well and to keep the world a good place.

question: the problem with thinking you know more than you really do
expected_answer: First, we look at how people think about what they know. Sometimes a person feels sure that they have the right answer. They feel like they see the whole picture. But in truth, they may only see a small part. The space between what they think they know and what they really know is the trouble. When a person thinks they know more than they do, they stop looking for more facts. They do not ask questions because they believe they already have the answer. This means they might miss important things. They might make bad choices because they did not see the full truth. For one case, if a person thinks they know how to fix a broken thing but does not really understand it, they might break it more. So, the thing to watch out for is that feeling too sure can keep a person from learning the rest of the story. It is better to admit when we do not know so we can keep looking and find the true facts.

question: why some deals hold together and others fall apart
expected_answer: First, we must look at what happens when two or more people agree to do something together. We can call this a way of working together to get something they both want. To see why some of these ways of working together stay strong and others break, we must look at what makes them work. First, we look at what each person gets from the work. If one person gets a lot and the other gets very little, the one who gets very little might feel it is not good to keep going. This can lead to them leaving or not doing what they said they would do. Second, we must look at what each person thinks the other person will do. If a person thinks the other person will not do their part, they will stop doing their part too. This is a bad way to work because it makes the whole thing break. Third, we look at how much it would hurt someone to stop the work. If it is very hard to stop, then people will stay even if things are not great. If it is very easy to stop, then the work might end very fast. The thing after the third thing, we look at how much people trust each other. Trust is the feeling that the other person will do what they said they would do. Without this feeling, the work cannot stay together for a long time. Finally, we look at how much the people need each other. If one person can do everything alone, they have no reason to stay with the other. If they must have the other to get what they want, they will try harder to make the work stay strong. This tells us that for a way of working together to stay strong, it must be such that both sides get what is right for them, it must be built on trust, and both sides must need the other to get what they want.

question: why who someone is to you changes what you should do for them
expected_answer:
When you think about what you should do for another person, you are trying to find the right way to act. You might ask yourself if you should help them or give them something. The answer to that question is not the same for every person. It changes because the way you see that person changes.

First, we must look at how people are different to each other. Some people are far away from you and you do not know them at all. You might see them on the street once. They are just another person in the world. Because you do not know them, you do not have a special tie with them. Your job to them is small. You might help them if they fall down, but you do not have to give them your whole life or all your money.

Second, we look at people who are closer to you. These are people like your mother, your father, or your children. You have a very strong tie with these people. You have spent much time with them. You care about their feeling of being good as much as your own. Because they are so close to you, the thing you should do for them is much bigger. If your child wants food because their stomach feels bad, you will give them your food before you give food to a stranger. This is because the person is special to you.

Third, we look at people who are in the middle. These are friends or people you work with. You know them, but they are not your family. Your job to them is more than to a stranger, but less than to your family. You might help a friend move their things, but you might not give them your house.

The reason this happens is because of how we feel and how we live. We are not just machines that act toward every person in the same way. We are living things that build ties. These ties make some people more important to us than others. These ties tell us how much we should give. When you decide what to do, you are not just looking at the thing you are doing. You are looking at the person you are doing it for. The place that person has in your life tells you how much you should care. Because of this, the person you are helping changes the way you should act.

question: what it means to live a good life by being a good person
expected_answer:
First, the first idea they tell us is that a life that feels good comes from being a good person. They say that if you try to act kind, right, and tell the truth, then your own days will feel better. They point to the thought that when you give help to others you also get help back, and that this give‑and‑take makes the whole way of your days feel more good.

Second, the second idea they add is that this first thought makes other thoughts follow. They think that because you are a good person you will get love, trust and a calm feeling from the people around you, and that these things will make your life feel safe and happy. They also think that if you act in a way that hurts or lies to others, then you will find yourself hurt, alone or in trouble, so you will not have a good life. They say that the way you do things that people do is like a road that leads you to the kind of days you will have.

Third, the third idea looks at whether the group of thoughts is good. It can be true that many people feel better when they act kind and that many people feel worse when they act mean. It is also true that this give‑and‑take can also change how your days feel. But the thinking that this alone makes a life good can miss other things. Body being well, chance, the place you are born and the ways of the world can also change how your days feel. Sometimes a kind person can be hurt by bad chance, and sometimes a person who does not try to be kind can still have some good days because of chance or help from others. So the thinking is in part because it reminds us to try to be kind, but it is not always enough to say that this alone will make every day feel good. A better way to think is to see the kind things that people do as a strong part of a good life, while also seeing that other parts of the world can help or hurt us, and that we may need to work on those parts too. In that sense the thinking is good, but it should be held with the idea that it is only one part of a bigger view.

question: why someone's character does not decide if their point is right
expected_answer:
When we hear a person say something, we can ask if the thing they say is right. The way the person acts or how others feel about them does not tell us if the thing they say is right. Let us look at this step by step.

First, think of a person who is nice and kind. They may say that the sky is blue. The sky is blue because we can see it that way. The nice way the person acts does not make the sky being blue any more true, and it does not make it any less true. The truth of the sky being blue comes from the sky itself, not from how the person feels.

Second, think of a person who is not nice or who acts in a hard way. They may also say that the sky is blue. The hard way they act does not change the fact that the sky looks blue. Again, the truth is about the sky, not about the person.

Third, we can see that a point can be right or not right no matter who says it. To see if a point is right, we can look at the thing it talks about and see if it is the same as what we see or what we can check. If it is the same, we can call it right. If it is not the same, we can call it not right. The feeling we have about the person does not change this same.

The next step, we can also see that a person can be good in many ways and still be wrong about a fact, and a person can be bad in many ways and still be right about a fact. The two things are not the same. One is about how the person acts, the other is about the thing they say.

So, when we hear a point, we should not let the way the person acts decide if the point is right. We should look at the point itself, see if it is the same as what we see, and then decide if it is right. The way they act is a different thing that does not decide the truth of the point.

question: the difference between a strong reason and a weak reason
expected_answer:
When a person looks at why they do one thing instead of another, they may feel that one reason feels strong and another reason feels not strong. The strong reason feels like it will really push what happens in one way, while the not strong reason feels like it may not do much at all. The hard question is how we can tell when a reason is strong and when it is not strong. It is not just a feeling, it is a question that can make us think a lot about how we decide what to do.

One way people answer is to ask if the reason has many facts that line up with what we already see. When a reason comes with many facts that line up with other things we know, many people say that makes the reason strong. They think that the more facts we have, the more we can be sure the reason will work the way we think. Others say that a reason can be strong even if it does not have a lot of facts, if it fits well with the big picture of what we already see. For them, the fit with the whole set of things we know is more important than a count of facts.

Another group of people look at how the reason makes us feel safe or safe from hurt. If a reason seems to keep us from hurt, they call it strong. If a reason seems to lead us toward a bad place, they call it not strong. They may also think about what the reason will let us do later. A reason that lets us reach more good things later can be called strong, while a reason that stops us from getting good things can be called not strong.

Still another set of people think about how many other people have used the same reason and seen it work. They look at the number of times the reason has been used and the number of times it has helped. If many people say it helped them, they say the reason is strong. If only a few people say it helped, they say it is not strong. Each of these answers comes from a different way of looking at the world, and each can make sense in its own way. The hard question stays the same: what makes a reason strong or not strong, and why do we feel one way about it and another way about another? The answer may be together of facts, fit with what we know, feeling of being safe, and the stories we hear from others.

question: the problem of hurting one person to help many
expected_answer: First, we see a case where one person may be made to feel hurt in order to give a good thing to many other people. Then we think about what it means to let that one person be hurt while the many get help. We notice that the one person has the taking away of something they need, like the feeling of being okay or the feeling of being well, and the many get something they need, like food or a feeling of being okay. Next, we ask if it is right to let the taking away of the one be used for the getting of the many. Some people feel that it is not right because the one did not ask for the taking away and may get nothing back. Others feel that it might be okay if the many need the good thing much more than the one needs what is taken away. Then we look for other ways to give the many a good thing without making the one feel hurt, such as give more or find more of the good thing. In the end, the problem is that we have to choose whether it is okay to hurt one person so that many can be helped, and we have to think about other ways to stay away from that hurt.

question: how to pick the best reason out of many that could be right
expected_answer:
Sometimes you have many different ways to tell why something happened or why something is true. You must find the one way that has the most chance of being the right one. To do this, you should look at each way one by one.

First, look at how much each way needs to be true. If a way to explain something needs many things to happen at the same time, it is probably not the best way. A good way to explain something should not need too many extra things to be true. If you have to believe ten things that you cannot see just to make your way work, then your way is not as good as a way that only needs one thing to be true.

Second, look at how much new stuff your way brings into the world. If you have two ways to explain why the ground is wet, and one way says it rained, while the other way says a big water machine fell from the sky and broke, the first way is better. The second way brings in a big machine that no one saw and no one can show. We should pick the way that does not add too many new things that we cannot see or touch.

Third, look at how well the way fits with what we already know. If a new way to explain something goes against everything we have seen before, we should be very careful. We should only pick that way if it is much, much better than all the other ways.

To find the best way, you take all these things and put them together. You want the way that needs the fewest things to be true, the way that does not add too many new things, and the way that stays close to what we already know is true. When you do this, you find the way that has the most chance of being the truth.

question: why what you already believe changes how you see new things
expected_answer:
You have a set of thoughts in your head about how the world works. These thoughts are like a way of seeing things. When you see something new, you do not see it in a way that is clean and free from what you already know. Instead, you look at the new thing through the way you already think.

First, think about how you see colors. If you think the sky is always blue, you will look at the sky and look for blue. You will not look for other colors because your mind is already set on blue. This is how your thoughts work with new things too.

Second, your mind wants to feel that it is right. It is not a good feeling to think that what you know is wrong. When you see something new that goes against what you believe, your mind tries to change the new thing so it fits with your old thoughts. You might tell yourself that the new thing is not true or that it is not important. This makes you feel safe in your own mind.

Third, your mind looks for things that say you are right. If you believe that all dogs are mean, and you see a new dog, you will look for the mean things in that dog. You might see it make a loud and angry sound and say, I knew it. But if you see the dog being kind, you might say it is only acting that way to make you think something that is not true. You find the things that are the same as your old thoughts and you throw away the things that are not the same.

Because of this, two people can look at the very same thing and see two different things. One person sees a thing that proves they are right, and the other person sees a thing that proves they are right. They are not looking at the thing in a way that is the very same. They are looking at it through the eyes of what they already believe. Your old thoughts act like a window that changes the color of everything you see through it.

question: how to think about what is fair when people start in different places
expected_answer: First, we must look at how people start their lives. Some people start with many things like money and good homes. Other people start with very few things and must work much harder just to get what others have for free. Second, we must decide what we mean when we say something is good and right. Some people say that being right means everyone gets the same things at the end. This is hard because some people might work more or have a special way of doing things that is better than others. Third, other people say that being right means everyone gets the same chance to try. But a chance is not the same if one person has shoes and the other person has no shoes. The person with no shoes will find it much harder to run the fast way to the end. The thing after the third step is that we can think about this by looking at the start of the way to the end. If we want things to be right, we might need to give more help to the person who starts far behind. This way, the way to the end is not just about who started in a good place. The thing after that is that we can also think about the things that make life hard for some but easy for others. This is made of things like how much money a family has or where they live. To make things right, we must look at these starting points and try to make them more the same. Finally, we see that being right is not just about the end of the story, but about making sure the beginning is not too hard for some people.

question: what it means for a case to be put together well
expected_answer:
When you want to show that something is true, you must build a path of thoughts that leads a person to believe you. To do this well, you must start with things that everyone knows are true. These are your first pieces of the path. If your first pieces are not true, the whole path will fall down.

Second, you must use these true things to reach your next thought. Each new thought must follow from the one before it in a way that makes sense. If you jump from one thing to a different thing without a way to get there, your path is broken. People will look at the empty space between the thoughts and stop believing you. You must show how the first thing makes the second thing happen.

Third, you must look for things that might show you are wrong. If someone shows you a piece of information that goes against your path, you cannot just hide it. You must talk about it. You must show why that piece of information does not break your path. If you ignore the things that make you look wrong, people will not trust your work.

The thing after the third thing, you must make sure your path is strong and does not have holes. A hole is a place where a person can ask why and you have no answer. You must be able to answer every why. You must show that your thoughts are not just what you want to be true, but what the world shows is true.

Finally, the end of your path must be the thing you wanted to show. If your path is built well, a person who follows it from the start will reach the end and feel that they have no choice but to believe you. They will see that the path was easy to follow, the pieces were true, and the way you moved from one piece to the next was the only way to go.

question: why what happens after you act matters for whether it was right
expected_answer:
The first idea they tell about is that the thing that comes after a person does something is part of how we know if that thing was good or bad. They say that we cannot look at the act alone and then say it was right or wrong without also looking at what comes after. In their view the later thing is a part of the picture that tells us if the act was the right one.

From that first idea they think a second idea follows. They think that because the later thing is part of the picture, we must always check the later thing before we call an act right. In their mind this means that if the later thing hurts people or makes life harder, then the act was not the right one, even if the act seemed fine at the time. They also think that if the later thing helps people or makes life better, then the act can be called the right one, even if the act seemed a little different at first. So the second idea is that the later thing shows how good the act is.

When we look at whether this thinking is good we can see both good points and not strong points. It is good that looking at the later thing can show us if an act brings help or hurt, and that can stop us from saying an act is good when it later brings pain. It also helps people think about the whole story, not just a single moment. But the thinking can be not strong if it forgets other parts that many people think matter. For a case, many people feel that the reason a person did the act, or the feeling in the mind at the time, also matters. An act that was done with a kind mind but that later brings a sad thing may still be seen by some as a good act, because the mind was kind. Also, sometimes what comes after is not clear or is caused by many different things, so it can be hard to say that the later thing alone makes the act right or not right. In short, the idea that the later thing matters a lot is good for us and can keep us from doing simple bad things, but it is not enough by itself to decide if an act was right. We need to take care of the later thing, the feeling at the time, and the whole view together.

question: why following rules is not enough if you do not care about people
expected_answer:
Think about a group of people living together in a place. To keep things good, these people make a set of things they must do. These are the ways they must act so that no one gets hurt and everyone can live without fighting. We can call these things the ways things must be done.

If a person only looks at these ways things must be done, they might think they are a good person. They might say, "I did not break any of the ways things must be done, so I am good." But this is not always true.

Imagine a person who sees someone fall down and get hurt. This person looks at the ways things must be done and sees there is no way that says they must help a person who falls. So, this person walks away and does nothing. They did not break any way things must be done, but they did not act with a good heart. They did not care about the person who was hurting.

When we only care about the ways things must be done, we miss the point of why we made them in the first place. We made these ways of acting to help people and to make sure people are seen in a good way. If we follow the ways but do not care about the people, we might find ways to follow the ways while still being mean or not good. We might find ways to follow the ways that actually make things worse for others.

A person who only cares about the ways things must be done is like a machine. A machine can follow a way without feeling anything. But a machine does not know if what it is doing is good or bad for a person. It only knows if it is doing what it was told to do.

To be a person who is very good, a person must do two things. First, they must follow the ways things must be done. Second, and it is a very big thing, they must care about the people around them. They must ask, "Will what I am doing make this person feel good or bad?" and "Will this help or hurt this person?"

If you only do the first thing, you can be a person who does no wrong but also does no good. If you want to make the world a better place, you must have a heart that cares about other people. The ways things must be done are only a starting point. The real thing we want to reach is to act toward people with love and a good heart.

question: why being sure about something does not make it right
expected_answer:
Sometimes a person feels very, very sure about a thing. They feel a strong feeling inside that what they think is true. They might even feel so sure that they would fight for it. But feeling sure is not the same as being right.

To see why, we must look at how we know things. We know things by looking at what is around us and by using our minds to make sense of it. But our eyes and our minds can do things that are not right. Our eyes might not see everything. Our minds might see things in a way that makes sense to us, but does not be the very same as how the world really is.

Think about a person who sees a dark shape in the woods at night. They feel very sure it is a large animal. They feel this in their heart. But it might just be a small tree or a pile of rocks. The feeling of being sure came from fear or from not seeing well in the dark. The feeling was strong, but the thing they thought was true was not true.

Another way we can be wrong is when we only look for things that say we are right. If a person thinks all birds are blue, they will look for blue birds. When they find one, they say, "See! I am right!" But they did not look for the red bird or the green bird. They only looked for what they wanted to find. This makes them feel very sure, but it makes them wrong about all birds.

Being sure is just a feeling in your head and heart. Being right is when what you think is the very same as the real world. A feeling can be very strong and still be wrong. We must always be careful. We must look at all the things around us and be ready to change our minds if we find out that our feeling was not the truth.

question: what it means to really know a thing and not just believe it
expected_answer:
The person is talking about what it means to have a way of knowing something that is not just a feeling that it is true. The first idea they tell us is that there is a way things are not the same when a thing is true and when a person thinks a thing is true. The second idea is that a person can think something is true even when it is not. The third idea is that a person can think something is true when it is true, but they might only think so because they were right by chance.

From these ideas, the person thinks we can find a way to say that we only know a thing when we have a good reason for it. They think that if we want to say we know something, we cannot just say it is true and that we believe it. We must also show that our belief rests on something strong that makes it hard to be wrong. They think that the third thing we need is a way to show that our belief was not just a way of being right by chance, but was held because of the good reasons we found.

When we look at how they think, we can see if the way they put these ideas together is good. The first part is good because it is true that people can believe things that are not true. The second part is also good because it is true that people can be right by chance. However, we must ask if the way they join these ideas is the only way. They think that the only way to know something is to have a good reason that cannot be wrong by chance. This is a very strong way of thinking. It is a good way to try to find the truth, but it might be hard to do in every case. question: what it means for a case to be put together well
expected_answer:
When a person puts a case together well, they make a story about why something is true that other people can follow and feel right. The first thing they do is pick a clear point that they want to show. This point is the main idea that the whole talk will turn to. 

Next, they look for facts that help the point. Each fact is something that can be seen, heard, or known for sure. They do not just pick any fact; they pick facts that are strong and that really fit the point. They also try to keep the facts simple enough that most people can see them. 

Then they put the facts in an order that makes sense. They may start with a fact that most people already know, then move to a fact that adds a little more, and keep going until they reach a fact that shows the point clearly. When they move from one fact to the next, they make sure the two fit together, like pieces of a thing that join at the sides. They use words that show how one fact follows the other, such as “and then,” “so,” or “because,” so the person can see the path from the start to the end. 

While they are putting the pieces together, they also check that each piece helps the whole. If a piece does not help, they take it out or use another one that is better. This keeps the case from having extra parts that only make it harder to see the point. 

At the end, they give a final part that ties all the earlier parts back to the main point. This final part shows the person why the whole set of facts together means the point is true. It is not a new idea, but a short rest of what has already been shown, so the person can feel the whole story is finished. 

A well put together case also uses words that are clear and not too hard. It avoids words that would hide the meaning or make the person stop and think about the word instead of the idea. It uses short lines and simple words, so most people can stay with the story from start to finish. 

When all of these things happen – a clear main idea, strong facts, a fitting order, each part helping the whole, a final tie back, and simple words – the case feels close, clear, and easy to understand. That is what it means for a case to be put together well.

question: how to decide whose good matters and how much

Second, we can think about what each person should get. In this way, we do not just look at all the good put together. We look at the person. Third, we can look at the things people do. We might say that being a good person means following certain ways of acting. We look at the person and ask, is this what a good person would do? We look at the heart and the way a person lives.

To make a choice, we often use more than one of these ways. We might try to make the most good, but we also stop to make sure we are not being not right to one person. We try to find a way to make all the good and the right way to act toward each single person work well together. It is a hard thing to do because there is no one way to be sure. question: why sometimes a good enough answer is better than the best answer
expected_answer:
Imagine you are building a house. You want the house to be the most perfect house in the whole world. You want the walls to be very strong and the floor to be very even and flat. You want every part of the house to be the very best it can be. But to make the house the very best, you must spend all your money and all your time. You might spend ten years making the windows perfect. While you are doing this, you have no place to live. You are cold and you want food because you are only working on the house.

The hard question is this. Is it better to have a house that is good enough to live in right now, or is it better to wait a long time to have a house that is the best?

Some people will say you must wait for the best. They think that if something is not the best, it is not good to do. They believe that if you stop before you reach the top, you have failed. They think that being able to finish something and move to the next thing is more important than making one thing the very best. They think that a good answer that works right now can do more for you than a perfect answer that comes too late.

This is a fight between wanting things to be perfect and needing to live in the real world. The world moves fast. If you wait too long to find the best way to do something, the thing you are trying to do might not be needed anymore. The person who wants the best might end up with nothing, while the person who wants good enough might end up with many good things.

question: why some deals hold together and others fall apart
expected_answer:
When two or more people agree to do something together, they make a promise. Sometimes these promises stay strong for a long time. Other times, the promises break and the people stop working together. To know why this happens, we must look at how the people think and how they act.

First, we must look at what each person gets from the promise. If one person gets much more than the other, the person with less may feel that the promise is not good. They might think that it would be better to walk away and do something else. If the things they get are not enough to make them happy, the promise will probably break.

Second, we must look at what happens if someone breaks the promise. If a person can break the promise and get more than they had before, they will probably do it. This is true if they can do it without being made to pay for it. If there is no way to make them pay for breaking their word, they have no reason to keep it. But if they know that breaking the promise will make them lose something important later, they will try to keep it.

Third, we must look at how much the people know. Sometimes, one person knows much more about the thing they are doing than the other person. This can be a problem. The person who knows less might be made to believe something that is not true. If they find out they were made to believe something that is not true, they will stop working with the first person. For a promise to stay strong, both people need to feel that they are seeing the same thing and that no one is hiding something.

The thing after the third thing we must look at is the people themselves. If the people do not trust each other, the promise will be hard to keep. Trust is the feeling that the other person will do what they said they would do. If you think the other person might hurt you or take your things, you will not want to make a promise. Even if the promise looks good on paper, not having trust can make it fall to pieces.

Finally, we must look at what happens in the future. If the people can work together many times, they will try to be good to each other. They know that if they are bad now, they will not have more promises later. But if they will only work together one time, they might try to take as much as they can right now. This is because they do not care about what happens after the first time.

So, a promise stays together when both sides get what they need, when it is hard to break the promise without losing something, when everyone knows the truth, when there is trust, and when the people want to work together many times. If these things are not there, the promise will probably break.

question: why being good at being a person is like being good at anything else
expected_answer:
We see a lot of talk about how a person can try to be a good person. In this talk a person looks at the way they act, the way they feel, and the way they act toward other people. They watch how they change over time and how other people say what they think. This watching and changing feels a lot like the way a person might try to be good at a game or work. The scene is that many people sit and think about why the work of being a good person seems to follow the same steps as the work of being good at any other thing.

The thing that is happening is that a person takes the thing they want, such as “be nice” or “be just”, and then they look at what they do each day. They get the way other people tell them how they did, from themselves, and from the way the world shows a change. They try again, they learn a little, they try again, and they feel a little better when they see that the world seems a bit nicer. All of this looks a lot like the way a person learns to play a game, to draw, or to fix a thing that works. The hard question that comes up is why the work of being a good person should be thought of as the same as the work of being good at any other thing. Is there something special about the feeling part of being a person, or is it just another set of things they do that can be tried, watched, and changed?

One answer that many people give is that being a good person is just a set of things they do that can be seen and tried. They say that being nice, telling truth, and care are things they do that can be done many times like a game move. When a person watches how those things work, they can do the same as them, they can get a feel for when they work, and they can get better with time. This answer rests on the idea that any thing you get good at, whether it is a game move or a caring act, is learned by trying, by the way other people tell them how they did, and by changing what they do.

Another answer that some people share is that being a good person is not only about things they do but also about feelings and other people. They point out that when you care for someone you feel something inside, and that feeling can push you to act in a certain way. Because feelings are part of the way it goes, they think the work of being a good person may need a different kind of care than the work of fixing a thing you use. They say the need to feel safe, to feel loved, or to feel that you belong can make the learning path a bit different, even if the steps of trying and watching are still there.

A third answer comes from those who look at the ideas that big groups of people make. They say that big groups of people make a set of ideas about what it means to be good, and those ideas act like a game with signs and ideas that tell what to do. In that view, being a good person is like playing a game where you try to follow the ideas, get a good feeling, and avoid a bad feeling. Because a game has a clear set of moves and a clear way to see if you do well, they think the work of being good at a person is very much like the work of being good at any other game.

All of these answers try to tell about why the work of being a good person looks a lot like the work of being good at other things. Some say it is because both are sets of things they do we can try and change. Some say it is because feelings add an extra part that makes it a bit special. Some say it is because the ideas we share act like a game. The talk continues as people think about which of these ideas feels the most true and how they might use that thought to keep trying to be a better person, just as they would keep trying to be better at any other thing they care about.

question: what it means to live a good life by being a good person
expected_answer:
The first idea is that a person can live a life that is good by being a person who is good. This means that the way a person acts and the things they do for others are what make their life have a lot of good in it. The person says that being good is the main way to have a life that is good to live.

The second idea is what follows from this. If this is true, then a person does not need many things like money or power to have a life that is good. They only need to act in a way that is right and kind. The person thinks that if they do good things, they will have the kind of life they want.

To see if the thinking is good, we must look at how the two ideas fit together. The first idea says that being good makes a life good. The second idea says that this means we do not need other things. This thinking might be good, but it might also have holes. It is hard to say if being good is the only thing that makes a life good. Some people might say that having enough food or a safe place to sleep is also needed to have a good life. If a person is good but has no food, is their life still good? We do not know the answer for sure. The thinking is a good start, but it may not tell the whole story of what a life is.

question: why the rules should be the same for everyone
expected_answer:
Imagine a group of people living together in one big place. This place has many ways of telling people how to act so that everyone stays safe and happy. These ways are what we call the things everyone must do. Now, imagine that one person is very strong or has a lot of money. This person might think that they should not have to do the same things as the person who has little power or has no money. They might think that because they are important, the ways of acting should be different for them.

The hard question is this. Should the ways of acting be the very same for every single person, no matter who they are or what they have? Should the person with much power follow the same ways as the person with no power?

Some people say yes, the ways must be the same for everyone. They say that if the ways are not the same, then the ways are not good. They think that if one person can do something that another person cannot, then the whole group will break into pieces. They believe that for a group to stay together, everyone must be under the same power. If the ways change because of who you are, then the ways are just ways to help the strong and hurt those who have little. This makes people feel that the group is not what people call right and they will stop wanting to be part of it.

Other people might say no, the ways should not be the same for everyone. They might say that some people need more help than others. To show what they mean, if a person is very sick, they might need different ways of being cared for than a person who is strong and well. They might say that if we act with everyone in the very same way, we might actually hurt the people who are already having a hard time. They believe that being right means looking at what each person needs to live a good life, not just making everyone do the same thing.

These two ways of thinking are hard to bring together. One way wants to make sure no one is above the group, while the other way wants to make sure everyone gets what they need. People spend a long time thinking about how to find a way to do both.

question: why we should not accept something just because many people believe it
expected_answer: First, we must look at how people come to believe things. Many people believe a thing because they hear others say it is true. They see a large group of people acting as if it is true, so they think it must be true. This is a way of thinking that many people use every day. Second, we must see that the number of people who believe something does not tell us if the thing is true or not. A thing can be true even if only one person knows it. A thing can also be wrong even if every single person on the earth says it is true. Third, we can see that people often believe things for reasons that have nothing to do with what is real. They might believe something because they are afraid, or because they want to feel like they belong to a group. They might believe something because it makes them feel good, even if it is not the truth. The step after the third step is that we must realize that if we only believe what many people believe, we will never find new truths. If everyone thinks the earth is flat, and we only believe what the group says, we will never find out that the earth is round. The step after that step is that we see that truth is about how things really are in the world, not about how many people think about them. To find what is true, we must look at the world and see how it works, rather than just listening to the noise of the crowd. For these reasons, we should not let the number of people who believe a thing be the reason we think it is true.

question: the idea that the right thing to do is what leads to the most good
expected_answer:
Many people wonder how to know if what we do is good or bad. One way to think about this is to look at what happens after we do something. This way of thinking says that the best thing to do is the thing that makes the most good feelings or the most good for the most people.

To understand this, we must first think about what good means. We can say that good is when people feel good or when they do not feel pain. If what we do makes many people feel good and very few people feel hurt, then what we did is a good thing. If what we do makes many people feel hurt, then it is a bad thing.

Let us look at this step by step. First, we look at a choice we must make. Second, we think about all the people who will feel the things we do. Third, we think about how much good feeling or pain each person will feel because of what we do. The thing after the third step is to add up all the good feelings and take away all the pain. The choice that leaves us with the most good feelings is the one we should pick.

This way of thinking asks us to look at the end of what we do. It does not matter if we wanted to do good if the end thing that happens is bad. It only matters how much good we actually bring into the world. For one thing, if you want to help a person but what you do makes ten other people very sad, this way of thinking might say you did not do the right thing. You must try to make the world as full of good feelings as it can be for as many people as possible.

Some people find this hard. It is hard to know the future and to know how much good feeling every person will feel. It is also hard to know if the good feeling of one person is more important than the good feeling of another person. But the main idea stays the same. We should try to make the world a place where there is more good feeling and less pain by looking at the things we do and what happens because of them.

question: the idea that you should only follow rules everyone could agree to
expected_answer:
Think about how we live together in a big group of people. To live without fighting, we need ways to act that everyone knows and follows. Some people think we should follow what we are told because a person with much power says so. Other people think we should follow what we are told because it makes us feel good. But there is a different way to think about how we should act.

This way of thinking says that a way of acting is only good if every person could say yes to it. Imagine you are making a new way for people to act. Before you make this way, you must ask yourself a question. You must ask if every person in the group could agree to this way of acting, even if they were not the ones who got the best part of it.

Let us look at a way that is not good. Imagine a way of acting that says the people with much food can take food from the people with no food. This way might help the people with much food feel full. But if you were a person with no food, you would say no to this way of acting. You would not agree to it. Because not every person can say yes to it, this way of acting is not a good way to live.

Now let us look at a way that is good. Imagine a way of acting that says no one can take things from others without asking. This way helps the person with much food and it also helps the person with no food. If you were the person with much food, you would want this way to keep your things safe. If you were the person with no food, you would want this way to keep your things safe. Since every person can say yes to this way of acting, it is a good way.

This idea tells us to look at what we do from the view of everyone. We should not make ways of acting that only help us or only help our friends. We should only follow ways of acting that would work for every person in the world if everyone did them. If a way of acting cannot be agreed to by every person, then it is not a good way to act.

question: how two things happening together does not mean one causes the other
expected_answer: First, we see that two things can happen at the same time. One way to show this is to look at the sun and a bird. The sun comes up and the bird makes a loud sound. These two things happen together every day. Then we might think that the bird makes the sun come up because it makes the sound right before the light appears. But this is not true. The sun comes up because of the way the world turns, not because of the bird. So, just because two things happen near each other in time does not mean one makes the other happen. Next, we look for a real reason why things happen. We need to see if changing one thing changes the other. If we stop the bird from making the sound, the sun still comes up. This shows that the sound did not cause the sun to rise. Finally, we understand that seeing two things together is only a start. We must look deeper to find the real cause. We should not jump to a guess about cause just because things are tied in our eyes. We need to check if one thing really pushes the other to happen.

question: how to find the hidden parts of someone's case
expected_answer:
When you want to know the true story of what happened in a fight or a bad thing, you must look for the parts that are not seen. People often do not tell the whole story. They may hide things because they are afraid or because they want to look good. To find these hidden parts, you must act like a person who looks for things that are lost.

First, you must look at what people say. Listen to every person who was there. Do not just listen to the words they say, but also look at how they say them. If a person stops talking suddenly when you ask about a certain time or a certain thing, that is a sign. That silence is a way of hiding something. You should ask the same thing many times in different ways to see if their story stays the same. If the story changes, you have found a place where something is hidden.

Second, you must look at the things that were left behind. These are the things that do not lie. If a person says they were sleeping, but their shoes are wet and have the black wet earth from the ground on them, then the shoes are telling a different story. The shoes show what really happened. You must look at all the things that can tell you about the time and the place.

Third, you must look for what is not there. This is the hardest part. If a person tells a story about a big fight, but they do not say who started it, you must ask why that part is gone. If a story is missing a piece that should be there, that missing piece is where the truth is hiding.

Finally, you must put all these pieces together. You take what people said, what the things showed, and what was missing. You look for the points where they meet. When the things that were seen and the things that were hidden fit together into one big picture, you have found the truth of the matter.

question: how the way choices are shown can change what you pick
expected_answer: First, we look at how a person must pick between things. We think that a person will pick what is best for them. But, the way we show the things to pick can change what that person picks. We see this when we give a person a group of things to choose from. If we show many things, the person might pick something different than if we show only two things. This happens because our minds look at how things are the same or how they are not the same. To show this, if we show a thing that is very bad and a thing that is a little bad, the person might pick the little bad thing and think it is good. But if we show that same little bad thing next to a thing that is very good, the person might pick the very good thing instead. This means the way we put the things together changes how the person sees how much a thing is good for them. Second, we see that the order of the things can change the pick. If we show a very good thing first, the person might feel like they have already won and pick something less good later. Third, we see that how we say things about the choices can change the pick. If we say a thing will help you, you might want it more. If we say a thing will not hurt you, you might feel the same way. Even if the two ways of saying it mean the very same thing, the way we say it makes the person feel different. In the end, we see that the way we show choices can lead a person to pick something they might not pick if the things were shown in a different way.

question: what makes someone happy in the deepest way, not just for a moment
expected_answer: First, we must think about what it means to feel good for a short time and not the same as feeling good for a long time. A short time of feeling good can come from eating good food or getting a new thing, but these feelings go away fast. To find the deep way of feeling good, we must look for things that stay with a person even when things are hard. Second, we look at how a person lives their life and how they act toward other people. We see that when a person helps others or does things that are good and right, they feel a kind of quiet heart that does not go away easily. Third, we see that having a reason to get up in the morning is very important. This means having something you want to do or a way to use your own power to make something happen in the world. The thing after the third thing, we look at how a person sees themselves. If a person feels they are a good person and they are doing what they should do, they feel a deep power inside. The thing after the thing after the third thing, we see that being part of a group of people who care about each other also helps. When we are not alone and we belong to a group, our hearts feel full. Finally, we can see that the deep way of feeling good comes from many things put together. It is not just one thing, but a way of living that brings a quiet heart, helps others, and gives a person a reason to be in the world.

question: why sharing all you know is not always the best move
expected_answer:
When you know something that can change how things work, you might think that telling everyone is the best thing to do. You might think that if everyone knows the same thing, the whole world will become better and faster. However, there are many reasons why keeping some things to yourself can be a good choice.

First, we must think about how people use what they learn. If you tell someone a way to make things work better, they might use that way to help others. But they might also use it to hurt others or to take things that do not belong to them. If what you know can be used to do bad things, then telling everyone might cause more pain than good.

Second, we must think about how much work it takes to learn something. It takes a long time and a lot of hard work to find out how something works. If you give that work away for nothing, you might not have the power or the money to find out more things later. If people can just take what you know without doing the work themselves, they might stop trying to learn on their own. This could make the whole world stop growing and stop finding new ways to live.

Third, there is the problem of how people act when they get new information. Not everyone will use new information in a good way. Some people might get scared or angry when they learn something new. This can lead to fighting or to people making bad choices because they do not understand the thing you told them.

Finally, we must think about how much a person can hold in their head. If you try to tell everyone every single thing you know, the information can get all together in a way that is not clear. It can become a state where no one knows what is true and what is not. When too much information comes at once, people often stop listening or they start to believe things that are not true.

So, while sharing can be good, you must think carefully. You must look at who will hear you, how they will use it, and if the world is ready to hear it. Sometimes, the best way to help is to wait and to share only with those who can use it to do good.

question: why someone's character does not decide if their point is right
expected_answer:
Imagine a person who is not a good person. This person might lie a lot or be mean to others. Now, imagine this person says something about how the world works. For one thing, they might say that the sun rises in the east every morning. Even though this person is bad, what they said is still true. The sun does rise in the east. The truth of the thing does not change because the person who said it is bad.

The hard question is this. Does the kind of person someone is change whether what they say is true? Many people think that if a person is bad, we should not listen to them. They think that if a person is bad, their words must be bad too. But this is not how truth works. Truth stays the same no matter who says it.

Some people might say that we should only believe good people. They might say that a bad person will try to make us believe things that are not true. They think that if we listen to a bad person, we might get hurt. For these people, the way a person acts is a way to see if they can be trusted. They use the person to decide if the words are good.

Other people might say that we must look only at the words themselves. They think that if a person says something that can be checked, we should check it. If the person says the sun rises in the east, we look at the sun. We do not look at the person. They believe that truth is not the same thing as the person. They think that if we let the way a person acts change how we see truth, we will lose our way. They think we will stop seeing what is true because we are too busy looking at how people act.

question: why treating people as things to use is always wrong
expected_answer:
The person starts with the first idea, which is that every person has their own way of thinking and their own way of wanting things. They say that a person is not just a thing that can be used to get what you want. A person is a being that has their own life and their own things they want to do. This is the part that we can see is true. We know that people are not like stones or wood that we use to build a house. People have thoughts and feelings that matter to them.

The second idea is what the person thinks follows from this truth. They say that if you use a person only to get something for yourself, you are doing something bad. You are making them act like a thing instead of a being with their own life. Because of this, they say it is always wrong to make people act like things for you. They think that if you do not show that you care about the fact that every person has their own life, you are breaking a way of being that we must all follow.

The third idea is whether this way of thinking is good. To see if this is good, we must look at how the person moves from the first idea to the second. The person says that because people have their own lives, we must never make them act like things. This is a strong way to think. It is a good way to think if you want to make sure everyone is given care. However, some might say it is hard to know when a person is being used and when they are just helping another. But the heart of the thinking is strong because it rests on the truth that people are more than just things to be used.

question: when we have good reason to think a thing will or will not happen
expected_answer:
Sometimes we want to know if a thing will happen in the future. We might want to know if it will rain or if a friend will come to our house. We do not know for sure because we cannot see the future. However, we can look at what is happening now and what has happened before to make a good guess.

First, we look at the things that are happening right now. If the sky is very dark and the air feels heavy and wet, we have a reason to think it will rain soon. These are things we can see and feel. They give us a way to think about what might come next.

Second, we look at what happened in the past. If it has rained every time the sky was dark for the last ten years, we can use that to help us. We see things that happen in the same way over and over. When we see things that happen in the same way over and over, we can say that it is very possible that the same thing will happen again.

When we put these two things together, we have a way to say how much we believe something will happen. If all the things we see point to the same thing, we have a very good reason to believe it. We might say it is almost certain to happen. If the things we see point in different ways, we have a reason that is not strong. We might say it is not sure at all.

We must be careful, though. Just because something happened many times before does not mean it must happen every time. A new thing could come and change everything. We use what we know to make the best guess we can, but we must always remember that our guess is not the same as knowing for sure. We use the things we see and the things we remember to help us move through the world without being surprised all the time.

question: why some deals hold together and others fall apart
expected_answer: First, we must think about what happens when two people or groups say they will do things together. This way of saying they will work as one is a way for them to get what they want. We can see that some of these ways of working together stay strong for a long time while others break and go away. To understand why, we must look at what makes people stay in what they said they would do. First, we see that people must feel that what they get is good enough for what they give. If one person gives much and gets very little, they will want to stop. Second, we must look at what happens if one person stops doing what they said. If there is no way to make them do it, or if it does not hurt them to stop, they will probably stop. Third, we look at whether the people can see what the other person is doing. If they cannot see if the other person is being good, they will start to feel fear. This fear makes them want to leave. Finally, we see that if the people can work with others more easily, they might leave the first group to find a better one. So, a way of working together stays together when both sides get what they need, when they can see each other being good, when there is a way to make people do what they said they would, and when they do not have many other places to go.

question: how to build fair rules if you did not know your place in the world
expected_answer: First, we must think about a way to make choices about how people should live together. Second, we must imagine a way to make these choices without knowing who we are. This means you do not know if you are a rich man or a poor man. You do not know if you are a person with much power or a person with no power. You do not know if you are a person who has much or a person who has nothing. Third, we see that when you do not know your own place, you will want to make things good for everyone. You will not make a choice that helps only the rich, because you might be a poor person. You will not make a choice that helps only the strong, because you might be a person with no power. The thing after the third thing, we find that the best way to act is to pick the things that would be good even if you were at the very bottom of the world. The thing after that, we can see that this way of thinking makes the way we live together very good and right for all people.

question: how a story about one person does not tell us about everyone
expected_answer:
When a story talks about one person it only shows what that one person did, felt, saw or thought. It can give us a clear picture of that one life, but it does not give us a picture of all lives. Think of a group of many people as a big crowd. Each person in that crowd has a own home, a own job, a own family, a own way of seeing the world. One person may live in a city, may work with machines, may love music, may feel safe at night. Another person may live far away, may work with things that grow in ground, may love quiet, may feel scared at night. Because the ways that people live can be many and can change, a story about only one of them cannot tell us how the others live.

If we hear only one story we might think that everything in the story is true for all people. That would be like looking at one leaf and saying all trees have that leaf. The truth is that the leaf we see is just one leaf. To know more about the whole forest we would need to hear many stories, each from a different person, and we would need to see how those stories are the same and how they are not the same. When we have many stories we can start to see which parts are the same for many people and which parts are only for a few. That lets us say things like many people feel this way or many people do this way, instead of saying all people feel this way.

So a story about one person is good for learning about that one person, but it is not enough to learn about all people. To learn about all we need many stories, and we need to keep in mind that each story is only a small part of the whole picture. This helps us avoid thinking that one small part tells us about the whole. It also helps us keep an open mind when we meet new people, because we know that each new story may be different from the one we already heard.

question: how a group can agree on rules that are good for everyone
expected_answer:
A group of people wants to live or work together in a way that stays good and gives everyone what they need. To do this, they need to make a set of ways to act. These ways tell people what they can do and what they must not do. If everyone follows these ways, the group can stay together without fighting. But making these ways is very hard.

The hard question is how to find the ways to act that are good for every single person in the group in a way that is not wrong. It is easy to make ways that are good for some people but bad for others. It is also hard to know if a way is good for the whole group or if it only helps the people who have the most power. How do we know if we are being good to the person who has the least?

Some people say the best ways are the ones that make many people feel very good. They think if a way helps many people, even if it hurts a few, it is the right way to go. They look at how much good there is and try to make that number as big as it can be. They think this is the best way to take care of the group.

Other people say this is not right. They say that every person has certain things that should never be taken away. They believe that even if a way makes many people feel very good, it is wrong if it hurts one person in a way that is not right. They think we must have ways that keep every single person safe, no matter what. They think we should not use people just to make the group feel very good.

There is also a way of thinking where people try to make ways that they would agree to if they did not know who they would be in the group. Imagine you do not know if you will be the leader or the person with no money. You do not know if you will be strong or have little power. If you had to pick the ways to act before you knew your place, what would you pick? Most people would pick ways that are safe and right for everyone, because they might end up being the person at the bottom. This is a way to find what is good for all.

question: counterexample to: A set of sentences is consistent if and only if there exists a model that satisfies all members of the set, no sentence in the set is the negation of another, and the set is finite.
expected_answer: One way to look at the thought of a group of lines that all work together is this: a group is called the thought that all its lines can be true at the same time if there is a picture that makes each line work, no line says the not of another line, and the group has an end. The first point is the most well known and the most liked by many people. The second point can be seen as enough (though maybe not needed) promise against a clear kind of the thought that something says the not of something else. The third point – having an end – might be thought of because groups with no end bring hard things that the thought of the first point is not made to fit. Yet this point is clearly too small. Let us look at the group of all proved things of the first count number system. This group has no end, and so the thought we first gave would say it is not the thought that all its lines can be true at the same time. But it is the thought: the count numbers, in their normal way, make a picture that makes every proved thing of the system work. No thing that says the not of a thing that also says the not of a thing can be found. The group is, by every makes sense point, the thought that all its lines can be true at the same time. So we must see that the having an end point is not a real point of the thought that all its lines can be true at the same time and that the first thought, by adding it, keeps out things that clearly should be put in. The not enough of the way we say what something is is shown.
definition: A set of sentences is consistent if and only if there exists a model that satisfies all members of the set, no sentence in the set is the negation of another, and the set is finite.
counterexample: Consider a case in which one takes the set of all sentences of first-order Peano arithmetic. This set is infinite, so the third condition is not met. Yet the set is consistent in the standard sense — there exists a model (the natural numbers under the standard interpretation) that satisfies every sentence in the set. The finitude requirement excludes a paradigmatic case of consistency and is therefore too restrictive.
missing_condition: The definition erroneously requires that the set be finite; infinite sets of sentences may be perfectly consistent, as exemplified by the theorems of Peano arithmetic under the standard model.

question: counterexample to: Two or more agents cooperate if and only if (i) each agent is aware that they are participating in a joint activity, (ii) each agent intentionally contributes to a shared goal, and (iii) the agents have communicated with one another about their respective roles.
expected_answer:
The people who help each other with getting the food from the ground, the people who make music with four people together, the people who study how things work and write a piece of writing — these are clear things of people working together. In each thing, the people know they are doing a thing together, each does a thing for the same thing they want, and the people have talked about who does what. From these things one can make a simple thought: people work together if and only if each knows they are doing a thing together, each does a thing for the same thing they want, and the people have talked about who does what.  

But this thought, taken from things where the work together was made and talked about, leaves out a big area of work together that happens on its own and without talk. Think of two people who drive cars toward the one after the first on a small way. Each go slow and turn left. Not one has talked to the one after the first; no talk, no hand move, no sign go between them except the move of the cars themselves. Yet each knows they are doing a thing together – the trying to get past the one after the first in a small place – and each does a thing for the same thing they want to get past without a hit. The first two parts are true. But the one after the two parts is not: no talk about who does what has happened. The people who drive use a same thought – the way cars go – and they watch each other move. Their work together is on its own and without words and works well.  

The other things all had made work together where who does what was talked about and made, and the simple thought said that talk was must. But what made those things work together was not the talk itself but the way each people watch and answer the one after the first while both try for the same thing. The people who drive on the small way show just this watching and answering. The thought put together a same way of work together talking about who does what with something that must always be there and did not see the work together that happens without talk by use the same thought and the quick watch and answer of people to the one after the first things.
definition: Two or more agents cooperate if and only if (i) each agent is aware that they are participating in a joint activity, (ii) each agent intentionally contributes to a shared goal, and (iii) the agents have communicated with one another about their respective roles.
counterexample: Consider two drivers approaching each other on a narrow country lane. Each slows down and pulls to the left to allow the other to pass. Neither has communicated with the other; they have never met, and no word or signal passes between them beyond, perhaps, a brief nod of acknowledgement. Yet each is aware that they are participating in a joint activity — the negotiation of a narrow passage — and each intentionally contributes to the shared goal of avoiding a collision. The first two conditions are met, but the third is not: there has been no communication about respective roles. The drivers rely on a shared convention (driving on the left) rather than on any explicit communication. Yet their interaction is a clear instance of cooperation — indeed, it is cooperation of the most spontaneous and effective kind.

question: counterexample to: A region has a particular climate if and only if (i) the average temperature and precipitation are stable over a long period, (ii) the region can be assigned to a recognised climatic zone, and (iii) the climatic conditions are determined by the region's latitude and altitude.
expected_answer:
A thought about the air and rain says that a place has some air and rain only when most hot or cold how it is and rain or snow stay the same for a long time, the place can be put in a called area, and the air and rain are set by how far north or south the place is and how high the place is.  

This thought works very well for many places of the world: the warm and wet parts near the middle line of the earth are warm and wet because they are near the middle line, and the top of high land are cold because they are high.  

But the thought meets a big hard with places that the air and rain that many places have is different from what we think for how far north or south they are and how high they are.  

Think about the north west side of a land. A city there is at about the same north or south how it is as the south end of a far north land, but its cold times are much less cold.  

The reason is not how far north or how high the place is but a warm water moving in a big water, which brings warm water from a big water on the east side to the north west side of the land and makes the hot or cold how it is more high than we would think.
