people who study and say the first story means one thing but say the second story means something else are made to explain why a promise made before changes the must – whether it makes a must that cannot be broken, a very strong must, or just an extra reason that can still be ignored if there is a big enough hard thing for the body or life

the two stories work as a same two: the change between them is a very clear thing – the promise made before – and the change in how people feel about the two stories can be used to show their hidden idea of how a promise changes ideas about a person being in control of their own body

question: anomaly analogy (predictive) — geometric
expected_answer: For about many many years, people who work with numbers tried to get the last thought from the first four thoughts, thinking that the idea that there is only one line that never meets a given line when you start from a point not on it was so clear that it did not need its own thought. The thinking felt strong: in any drawing you could make, only one line from the point seemed to go next to the given line without ever meeting it. The idea inside this thinking was that any drawing of space that follows the first four thoughts would also have to follow the last thought. People checked this idea in the 1800 years and found it wrong when they built a kind of space that is not flat. In that not flat space, the first four thoughts work just as the old one said. Lines go on always, all right corners are the same, and you can draw circles. But from any point not on a line, there are many many lines that never meet the first line. The space between the two lines that come near the first line makes a small space, and any line inside that space will never meet the first line. The old idea that there is only one such line is not just a little wrong, it is very wrong: where the flat space has only one line that never meets, the not flat space has many many lines that never meet. The thing that comes from the fact that the not flat space is the other way, which makes lines move away from each other faster than flat space would make them. That other way of being not flat is not part of the first four thoughts; it is part of the last thought, and if it is there or not decides how all space looks. The look between flat space and not flat space works for the first four thoughts but stops at the last thought, and this stop is not a small wrong but a clear line that makes two different sets of thoughts far.

question: literal_similarity analogy (explanatory) — analytical
expected_answer:
the idea that the usual way something acts over a space can be found at a special inside point shows up two times in the first part of the study of change, one time for the fast change idea and one time for the adding up idea, and the two things that happen use the same kind of way we tell why even though they start with different ideas and different ways we show them

both say that the usual how something acts over a space is found by the thing at some inside point

the fast change idea says that if the thing can be changed without jumps then the usual how fast it changes over a space – the how high the line that joins the two ends goes – is found as the how fast it changes at one time at some inside point

the usual how high is found; there is a time when the how fast it changes is the same as the usual how fast it changes

the adding up idea says that if the thing has no jumps then the usual how much it is over a space – the all added together and then shared by the long of the space – is found as the thing has its own number at some inside point

the usual how much is found; there is a place where the thing has a number that is the same as its own usual how much

both ideas tell why the usual how something acts has a true place: not just that the usual how high is a number, but that the thing really has that how high somewhere; not just that the usual how much is a number, but that the thing really has that number somewhere

the ways we show them are different: the fast change idea can be turned into the idea that if a thing starts and ends at the same high then there is an inside place where the change is nothing, by taking away the line that joins the two ends and looking for a most big or most small inside place; the adding up idea uses the idea that if a thing goes from a low number to a high number it must pass every number in between, used on a thing with no jumps on a space that has both ends

both ways finally rest on the idea that the number line has no parts that are not there, which makes sure that many numbers that only go up or only go down will get close, that most big and most small places of a thing with no jumps on a space with both ends are there, and that a thing with no jumps will take every number in between

the fast change idea and the adding up idea are two ways to say the same idea – the usual how something acts has an inside place – used in two different number work places

question: probabilistic conditional, modus_tollens — perceptual
expected_answer: Looking at how well a person can hear soft sounds makes a different thinking trouble: most places where people study things use things that do not need the person to do anything. This hear check needs the person to give an answer each time they hear a sound, and how true the paper of how well they hear is needs the person to be true and to do the same way each time. A simple idea about sometimes shows this need: when a person gives a normal single sound hear paper in a soft room and the answers are the same and they work together, the paper probably shows the real how well they hear of the person. Many numbers show that this hear check gives almost the same paper when done the same way with people who work together; the paper changes only a little, usually a small size of sound, in this place. In a paper check about work, a person gave a single sound hear paper to a person who said they had a big work sound hear trouble. The paper showed some to strong hear trouble both sides for talking sounds. But when the same person had a check that listens for small sounds that come from inside head at the same time, those small sounds were there and strong, showing normal or almost normal inside head work at the sounds where the paper showed a big trouble. Also how well they understood talked words from many words did not fit the size of trouble the paper said. So the paper probably does not show the real how well they hear of the person. Using a simple thinking idea, the paper was probably not done in a soft room where the answers were the same and they worked together – the things fit best with someone making the paper show a higher soft sound number than they really have, something many people have seen before in paper checks.

question: material conditional, modus_ponens — consequentialist
expected_answer:
The idea that we think about what will happen, used for right ideas about places on a machine where people share things, looks at ways about checking what can be shown by what it does on the all good of all people. A way that makes more bad than other ways – whether by letting very wrong facts spread, by letting people work together to hurt others, or by stopping real talk by using too strong checking – is not a good reason no matter how nice the steps look or how much money reason it has. The other part, a way that makes less all bad than any possible way, meets the check for a good reason.  

If a way makes less all bad to people who use it and the whole group of people than any possible way, then the way is a good reason on the what will happen idea. The check is hard: it asks not just that the way be better than some ways but that it be better than all possible ways, where possible is decided by what can be done in real life given what the machines can do and what the law says.  

Suppose that careful looking at many things side by side – looking at how happy people are, counting how often bad things show up and how bad they are, looking at how the checking makes people less able to speak real talk, and looking at how much work and money other ways need – shows that the now set of machine checking and people looking and steps that get more strong does better for the all good than any other possible way. The first part is true. So, the end idea is: the way is a good reason on the what will happen idea. The step is right, and the end idea matters for how we run the place, even if the hard real work to show the one after the first part could not be done for sure in any real case.

question: strict conditional, defeasible — agricultural
expected_answer: The choices about putting the yellow food that people eat in the ground in the north growing places come down to one number more than any other: the ground hot at how deep we put it. The way of growing is simple. The baby part of the yellow food that people eat needs a low hot point. Below that point the tiny work inside the baby part does not start; the baby part stays still, and if it stays still in wet ground for long enough it will go bad. The point for the sweet yellow food that people eat is used by people who grow as about 50 points looked at at about two small deep, and at or above that hot with enough water, the start of growing begins in a way that works each time. So, in usual growing things, if the ground hot is at or above 50 points and the water stays, the sweet yellow food that people eat will grow in 7 to 10 days. That is not a hope or a guess. It is the life of the baby part working at enough hot. The north place has been at 52 points at the two small deep for 5 days in a line, with good water from last week rain going into the ground. The usual guess is that the baby part put now will start to grow in the time we think. The things that can stop it are not changes to the life of the baby part but changes to the idea that all other needed things are met. One thing is how good the baby part is: old baby part or baby part kept bad with about 7 out of 10 good will give not even start of growing no matter the hot. Another thing is a help that kills bad tiny things: some ways of using help on baby part work different in working cold ground. And hot staying the same matters; a cold short time that drops the ground back to 45 points before the baby part has taken up water would start the work again. The usual guess holds if not one of those things steps in, and knowing which things can stop it is part of seeing a place right.

question: probabilistic conditional, hypothetical_syllogism — games_and_sport
expected_answer:
Teaching about the game has come together on how hard you hold the stick as one of the most simple and often wrong parts of playing for fun, and the two step why and what happens line that goes from hold very hard to a big hit that makes a round bad is good to follow clear because both parts in it are real and made from how the body works.  

The first part is about how hard you hold and how the swing works.  

When a player presses the stick with a lot of force — more than a light hold, about a third of the most they can — the feeling of how hard you hold goes up the lower arm into the parts that pull and push the part where two bones meet that moves the hand.  

The parts at the end of the lower arm, instead of bending in a normal way during the back swing and making straight when the stick hits as the swing needs, become hard.  

The stick goes back with less bend at that part than the shape of the swing needs.  

What happens when the bend in the back swing is smaller is a way the stick comes down that is more up and down than best: the stick reaches the ball on a down path that is more up and down than flat, hitting the ball from above instead of through it.  

That is the first part.  

The second part is about the very up and down way the stick comes down and what the hit does.  

A stick that comes down very up and down into the ball will hit the ground before the ball on any swing where the path is not just right, making a deep hole in the ground behind the ball and making the hit go through that hole instead of at the low point of the path where the ball sits.  

What happens is less distance, wrong direction, and a big sound of a big hit that every person who plays for fun knows with a sad feeling.  

Put the two parts together: hold very hard and you will probably make a big hit.  

Both if parts are real and the line is good.

question: indicative conditional, constructive_dilemma — statutory
expected_answer:
Ending a company needs careful steps of giving out the things the company owns to keep safe both the owners, who get what is left, and the people who gave money to the company, who get first right to the things the company owns.

The law in most places makes a set of steps for ending a company that tell how the people who run the company must act about who gets first right.

The first if case talks about the case that makes the people who run the company have to pay: if a company ends and gives out its things to owners before paying the people who gave money, the people who said yes to the give out are to pay the people who gave money.

This hard case is hard in the way that it does not need the people who run the company to know the right number of money that need to be paid; the must to pay the people who gave money before giving out to owners is a simple step about being good and putting others first that the people who run the company are thought to know.

The second if case talks about the case that keeps the people who run the company from having to pay: if a company that is ending tells all the people who gave money that the company knows about and keeps enough things kept away from the things given out before giving out the rest of the things to owners, the people who run the company are not by themselves having to pay for those gives.

The telling and keeping steps let the people who run the company give out things in ending while keeping safe against later money asks, if they did the law steps with good care.

The company we talk about, a small made things company, was ending its work after 60 years of being a business.

The people who ran it had the real question of if the ending steps they had used gave enough safe.

The hard choice makes the question: either the company we talk about gave out without paying the people who gave money, making the people who run it have to pay, or it did the right telling and keeping steps, taking away the need to pay.

The hard choice does not settle the real fight, but it shows what the group that decides must decide to see if the people who gave money can hold the people who run the company to pay.

question: strict conditional, paradoxical — inductive
expected_answer: The study of how we know from many cases meets some of its big hard parts not because of clear wrong in thinking but because ideas that each seem fine run into things that people do not want to accept. The well known hard question about how we say an idea is true is the main story of this idea, and it comes straight from using a strong idea about a question of how we say an idea is true because we see cases that are the same as it. If an idea gets a good reason from each same case, then more same cases add more good reason for that idea. This idea, sometimes called the idea that each good case adds to the reason, looks almost like a talk of things: it means that the sign that an idea is true is that each good case adds to the reason for it. A group of people who study has put together a group of 10000 bird looks, each one says that the black bird they saw is black. By that idea, each look has added to the good reason for the idea that all black birds are black. Now think about the fact that the idea that all black birds are black is the same as the idea that any thing that is not black is not a black bird. These are the other way of saying the same big idea. A good case of the second idea is any thing we see that is not black and not a black bird — like a white shoe. The next point, which shows this same fact, is right. When we put the strong idea together with the same fact, we get that seeing a white shoe gives good reason for the idea that all black birds are black. The end seems to go against usual sense not because any step is wrong but because the feeling that bird ideas should be shown by bird sign — and not by shoes — does not fit with the strong idea and simple thinking.

question: indicative conditional, denying_antecedent — child_rearing
expected_answer: The sister of my husband has three children and has made what she calls a very careful way to the time to go to sleep, which in real life means she has one thing she uses with big sure and then is surprised when it does not work. The thing is: if a child is very tired, she will have a hard time falling asleep. This is true many times that it sounds like a thing of the world. If you keep them up past the time, a hard feeling thing starts and they become very busy and crying at the time that is ten. I have seen it happen with her first child. So the day after the first day of the week she had the youngest child in bed by seven, short sleep had been on the plan, no late things, everyone was fed and calm. She said that since the youngest child was clearly not very tired, there would be no hard time at the time to go to sleep. Four tens minutes later she was standing in the hall looking confused while the youngest child called out from the room for the one after the third time. The thing is, children who are seven do not only have a hard time at the time to go to sleep because they are tired. The youngest child had a trip the next morning and was excited enough about it that she could not quiet her mind. She had also spent four tens five minutes before dinner on her small thing, which does not help no matter how well rested she is. When she was not very tired, one reason went away, but there were three other enough reasons still working. You cannot guess an easy time to go to sleep just from taking away one thing. The time to go to sleep is many things together, and being very tired is only one of them.

question: analogy_proper analogy (predictive) — physics
expected_answer: The way two things are the same about heat moving and the moving of tiny parts that make things work is not just a picture but a number idea that people who make things use to plan all kinds of things, from the stuff that stops heat in a house to the stuff that keeps tiny computer parts cool. The first idea about heat moving says that how fast heat moves through a thing goes up when the change in how hot it is from one side to the other gets bigger and when the thing lets heat move easy, and it goes down when the thing is how thick. The second idea about tiny parts moving says that how fast the tiny parts move through a thing that lets them move easy goes up when the change in the how much that makes the tiny parts move gets bigger and when the thing lets the tiny parts move easy. Both ideas have the same shape. From this idea, a full set can change heat problems into tiny part problems: how hot something is takes the place of the push, heat move how fast takes the place of how many tiny parts move, and heat thing that stops — how thick over how easy heat moves times the size of the surface — takes the place of the thing that stops tiny parts. Every idea about how a line of tiny parts work then becomes an idea about how heat moves. Heat things that stop that are put one after another add together, just like the things that stop tiny parts add together. Heat things that stop that are side by side join together by the idea that you first turn each into a share of a whole and then add those shares. A wall with many layers — like hard piece, the stuff that stops heat, and a board — is looked at the same way as a line of things that stop tiny parts, and the how hot each place where two layers meet is found by using the idea that breaks the how much. This way of guessing heat from tiny part ideas is not just a help. People who make things for big flying machines that keep heat under control often draw pictures of heat paths, using computer things that act like tiny parts moving to guess how hot different parts are in big parts that are too hard to find answer with a number answer. The way the two things are the same works well: if you make the stuff that stops heat twice as thick, the heat thing that stops becomes twice as big and the same how much heat moving becomes half as big — a guess that was seen with real see and is the reason for the ideas for house heat use all over the world.

question: literal_similarity analogy (heuristic) — allegory
expected_answer:
People who help with how people act change use words from the deep sad place not as a extra picture but as a simple idea that shows something clear about the shape of the first part of the move that hard words do not show as well.  

The picture story shows many different things about the deep sad place that together tell what makes the hard feeling in the first part of the move different and what the right help should be.  

First, the sad feeling the deep sad place makes is not about the place they want to get to. The person has not stopped believing in the good place up high or stopped wanting to get there. The wet sad place is about the road, not the place they want, and this is why it is so hard to know: the person who moves cannot easily say why they feel they cannot go on because the place they want still seems right.  

Second, the small steps are there. Help does not make a road across the wet sad place; help finds a road that was already there but that is not seen by someone who is going down.  

This is the shape of the people who give help during the hard part of the move: not to give the person things they do not have but to show the things that are there but not easy to get because of the hard feeling.  

Third, the deep sad place is part of the shape. It is not on any picture of roads because it comes before any picture, and it cannot be gone around by picking a different first road.  

The books about how people act change say each of these things is true. People in the first part of the move – after the old way has been broken but before the new way has become strong – often think they are not moving forward enough, feel a hard feeling that they say is because the new place is wrong instead of because the move is hard, and are most easy to be hurt when the people who give help is most needed.  

The simple idea of the picture story is that it gives a name to this part, shows its shape with clear words, and gets both the people who give help and the person ready for what comes, which is the best getting ready that is there because the deep sad place cannot be gone around.

question: strict conditional, denying_antecedent — navigation_and_travel
expected_answer: Anyone who travels to other countries on trips that have more than one part learns fast that the smallest time the sky company says you need between flights at a big place where big things that move in the sky land and take off is only the lowest number, not a sure thing. The smallest time is the number that is lower than which the computer that gives the paper that lets you ride a flying thing will not let you buy the trip, or at least will show a note and give you a choice with extra time. If you try to buy a time that is less than the smallest time, the computer catches it – that is what the smallest time is for, it is the computer note. The big city in the main country says the smallest time needed between two flights inside the same area is 45 minutes, and this trip has 90 minutes, which is 45 minutes more than that point. The idea that comes next seems easy to understand but is not right: because the time does not break the part that tells what to do, the computer will not show a note and will let you buy the trip without any notice. Thinking that only that one part can cause a note and saying that a note can never happen runs into the fact that the computer has other parts too. This trip goes from the big sky company that is the main one in the first country to the sky company from the second country that shares the same flight, and the two flights use different doors far away in the place, and the computer does show a note – not for the time between flights but because the sky companies are different and because the first flight has often been late before, which makes the whole trip seem a problem kind. The computer shows a new choice to change the trip even though the time between flights is more than the smallest time. The smallest time is needed for that note about time, but it is not enough to make sure that no note can ever show.

question: material conditional, modus_tollens — weather_and_planning
expected_answer: People who live in the two low land towns on each side of the mountain pass have a simple thought that they have made better over many years of living with the winter road shut: if the pass is shut, nothing can go through until it opens again. There is no other way that a big car that carries things can take. The lower river road was washed away in a big water rise six years ago and was never made again, and the forest road on the north side has a door and is hard and can not be used by big cars that carry things in any case. The pass is the only way, which means the fact that the pass is shut means things do not move, and that is clear. If the pass shuts because of snow, the night big car thing between the towns stops, full stop. Drivers do not try the run, the company does not set times to take things for the same night, and anything that must be fast is kept at the start place. People in the low land know this and plan for it in the winter months, watching the mountain sky talk the way sea people watch big water rise talk. Last night, though, the things came at the right time — all 12 boxes from the place where things are put, brought before 6 in the morning as the usual plan says. The big car was in the lot when the person who works at the place that sends letters opened the door that moves things at 6 sharp. That tells you a clear thing about the pass. If the road had been shut, the things could not have come through. The things came through. That means the pass was not shut. That is the whole of the thought. You do not need a sky look to know the pass was open last night; the boxes at the place where things are put tell you that.

question: material conditional, paradoxical — inductive
expected_answer: The problem of using what we have seen to guess about what we have not seen is not only the well known question about making guesses from what we have seen to what we have not seen, but also a big question about which of the many could be true big guesses that fit with a set of facts are the ones we should use for new things. A person has a new question about this put in the way we say a guess is right. Suppose we all agree on a usual if then idea: if every green stone we have seen before the first thing is green, then the big guess that all green stones are green is right because of those things we have seen. This idea feels usual and is liked by any simple story about counting things we see. In a careful study of many green stones taken from many places where stones are taken out, every stone looked at before the first thing was seen to have the green color that comes from a certain metal. The group of stones was large, taken from many far places, and showed no stone that was not green. So the second idea is true: all green stones we saw before the first thing were green. The usual if then idea then gives the idea that the stone study makes the big guess that all green stones are green right. That idea follows the if then idea, and the idea is the one that any rock person or stone person would like. The strange question shows up when we see that the same stone study also makes the big guess that all green stones are green then blue stones – where this means a stone that is green if we look at it before the first thing and blue if we look at it after the first thing – because every stone that was green before the first thing is also a green then blue stone before the first thing. Both big guesses are made right by the same facts, yet they give guesses that can not both be true about the first stone we look at after the first thing: the green guess says it will be green, the green then blue guess says it will be blue. The if then idea so makes an idea that is stopped not by a usual stop but by the fact that we can also make a different idea that can not both be true from the same facts at the same time.

question: anomaly analogy (predictive) — mechanical_and_repair
expected_answer:
a car that stops working after about many minutes each time it runs and then stops gives a clear sign. the fact it stops at the same time shows that heat builds up; the slowing down shows that a part changes when both things happen at the same time. people who fix cars see this sign as a heat problem — usually a part that does not work well when it gets hot, like a part that uses power or a part that gets stuck because the thing that makes the car go turns into air that burns — and the idea is quick because car parts are different and can be counted and they act the same way when the same things happen. the sign shows the bad part; putting a new part fixes it.

someone who sees that fights with the other person happen a lot on the day after the week ends has seen a real thing. the sign tells us something in the same way the car sign tells us something: it makes the group of possible reasons for the fights smaller and points to a time. but the idea taken from car fixing does not work when we try to end the fights. seeing that worry on the day after the week ends may be part of the problem — and that may be true — does not mean that working on the worry will end the fights because the fights are not caused by one part that can be changed.

the time may be a case that turns on a set of ways people talk, worries that have built up and not been fixed, or different ways people work with how they feel when they think about the coming work week, and any of these would stay during the time of the day after the week ends even if the worry is made smaller.

using the car sign to think about the fights can be a good first step; the idea that taking away the thing we think causes the fights will fix them brings the idea that one part can be changed from a place where it works into a place where it does not.

question: abstraction analogy (heuristic) — epistemology
expected_answer:
the look of the first person has become one of the most strong ideas about how people think together in the last many years, and its use in work that looks at the world shows both the strong side and the less strong side of using a simple picture to think about things. the first person first look says there are two kinds of not right about what people think is true.

the first kind happens when a person says something and other people do not believe it because of the group the person is in, not because of what the person says.

the second kind happens when a group does not have the words or ideas to talk about what a person feels, because the needed ideas have not yet been made by the people who share that feeling.

later work by another person found a third kind of not right, a bad thing where people who are not strong have to spend time telling their story to people who are strong and get something good from that work.

the simple picture behind these things is: the bad thing comes from how people think about each other and about groups, and the bad thing is often not seen by the people who cause it because they think it is normal. to make it right, each person needs to learn to be more right in thinking, and the whole set needs to change the ways that let the bad thing happen.

when we use this picture for looking at how people check the writing of a person, it works as a way to find where the truth is changed that other books about not right ideas have written about but not all explained. studies that show writing from well known schools gets better marks, or that people who are women get worse marks when people know who the person who makes words is and where they work instead of when they do not know, can be seen as cases of the first kind of not right: the belief in the writing is changed by who the person who makes words is and where they work, not by what is written.

the picture also says that these changes will not be seen by people who look at the writing and do not know how many people know makes them think, which is the same as the finding that people who look at writing and see the name often say they are not changed by the name even when they clearly are.

the way does not take the place of real check but it gives an idea plan for putting the things we found together and finding where help is most needed.

question: anomaly analogy (predictive) — cross_jurisdictional
expected_answer: People who speak for the earth and people who study law of many lands have said that the group of people who decide about bad acts set of written words for making each person answer for a bad act gives a big shape for trying people who run a business for big hurt to the earth – a big hurt to the earth – and have guessed that the group of people who decide about bad acts will later try to have power to decide about more things like that. The big shape of the idea feels real and good. The group of people who decide about bad acts has made a very careful set of ideas about each person answering for what they do in a group, about the act that makes big hurt, and about the thinking part needed for the worst big bad acts. These careful ideas could be used easily for a bad act that is big hurt to the earth. But the guess that the group of people who decide about bad acts will get more power by using a like idea is probably not true, and that not true part is important. The group of people who decide about bad acts is a group that has a certain power that is set by a written thing that many states say yes to. The big idea that only what the written words say is a bad act stops it from making new bad acts that are not in the written words. If a group of people who decide about bad acts made a new bad act by saying it is like an old one, it would not just read the written words; it would be making new written words, and the big idea says that is not allowed. Putting big hurt to the earth into the power of the group of people who decide about bad acts needs a change to the written words, and that needs many states to say yes. No big number of using like ideas inside the group of people who decide about bad acts own past choices can stand for that step. The guess is really a say that the written words should be changed – a different and more real say.

question: anomaly analogy (argumentative) — epistemology
expected_answer: The talk about why we think something is true has three old answers: the answer that says we need a first point, the answer that says ideas fit together like a group, and the never ending line answer. The never ending line answer, first said by a person, says that what makes a thought seem right is a never ending line of reasons that never repeats, and each reason helps the thought above it. But that picture, when thought about, goes against the never ending line answer rather than with it. The law people written note gets its power from a clear first point – the time it was first taken, written down, from which every later move is followed. It is because the line has a real first point that later steps can be checked to see if they are true. A never ending line, by its form, has no such first point. It may be said that the never ending line person says that that picture is meant only to show the way each step needs the next, not that there must be a last step – each step helps the one before it forever. But this answer gives up the thing that makes the law people picture good, which is that a real person can check a short written note of marks. A line that no one can walk through, even in idea, by the person who wants to use it cannot get power from that picture whose whole power rests on being able to walk through it. The never ending line person has real help for her side – the way they are not the same between having reasons ready and having used them, for a thing – but the law people picture is not one of those things.

question: abstraction analogy (explanatory) — physics
expected_answer:
One of the most strange facts about a part of all we can see is that it has a lot of one kind of things and almost no different kind of things, even though the things that tell how things work say the two kinds should be the same in most ways.  

A person who learns and sees this not the same for the first time might ask: if the things that tell how things work are the same, why is the whole all not the same?  

The step where the same becomes not the same look, taken from ideas about things that pull, about small pulls that come together, and about long small things that turn, gives an easy answer.  

The look comes from three simple things that all have the same shape: the things that tell how things work are the same when you change something; a thing we can change – heat, pull, weight – goes past an important point; the thing then has two low ways it could be, both the same in how they work; and the thing by itself chooses one of those ways, ending up in a look that is less the same than the things that tell how it works.  

The main thought the look puts is that a thing that is the same can make something not the same even if nothing not the same was put in a way that is not seen at the start or in how it moves: the not the same comes from the choice itself, not from breaking the deep same.  

When we use this thought for one kind of things and the different kind of things, it works like this. The main things that people who learn use act like the thing that is the same. The getting colder of the early all we can see, as it changes from one step to another, acts like the thing we can change that goes past an important point. The two possible all that could be, one with more one kind of things and one with more the different kind of things, act like the two low ways. And the real all we live in, which has more one kind of things, is the thing that the thing chose by itself – it is less the same than the things that made it, but it still fits with the things being the same at the start.  

This way of looking at it quickly removes the looks like problem between a thing that is the same and a thing that is not the same: there is no problem, only a step where the same becomes not the same, which we know can happen.  

It also makes the still question clear: not why the all we see is not the same even though the things are the same, but what certain way made enough small change to move the choice to the big many of one kind of things we see.

question: indicative conditional, modus_ponens — weather_and_planning
expected_answer: I keep a small thing that shows air push in the door of the house, and I look at it each morning and again early afternoon when I think about anything that needs to be outside. The point he gave me was a drop of four of the air push in three hours: at that how fast or faster, something big is on the way. Not a quick rain or a light cloud – a real change in the sky. A big sky change is coming, and the question is not if we change plans but how fast. I have been thinking about sleeping in a small soft house in the back grass with my child night. That plan is stopped. Any thing that is coming moves fast enough to arrive by night, and being in a small soft house when a big air change comes is not a choice I would do again.

question: indicative conditional, paradoxical — perceptual
expected_answer:
The talk about a feeling that seems like a thing but there is no thing is a hard thing for the study of what we know about seeing, and its clear thinking form should be built again in a clear if then way.  

The first idea says a very normal and strong way about seeing what you know: if a seeing feeling is what you know about a thing, then there must be no possible other case that looks the same from the inside, where a person has the same feeling but the thing is not there.  

The way says a feeling that you are certain you know something by seeing, your place of knowing must be different from a place where you only seem to see it while being made to think wrong.  

What you know, in this way, needs a kind of safe that stops the other case that looks the same.  

The second idea is a note about the possible way of people with a body that see: for any seeing feeling that a normal person has, there is a possible other case—a very clear not real feeling—that looks the same from the inside and where the thing is not there.  

This is not a strange idea; head moves and some people show that the eye system can make feelings of any form and size without the thing being there.  

The thinking set of a bad thing or a head in a box is just a way to put this real possible thing together.  

From the two ideas, the final idea comes out as true: no seeing feeling that a normal person with a body has is what you know about a thing.  

The final idea is not strange in the clear way; it comes out without any wrong step.  

But it is strange in the way we think about knowing, because it goes against the strong belief that seeing is the first thing of what we know about the outside world.  

The point of the talk is not to accept the final idea but to push it on the first idea.  

People who talk about safe ways say that the important other cases are not all clear possible cases but only those that are close to the ways of the world—and very clear not real feelings are far from the ways of the world.  

People who say real feeling and not real feeling are not the same, so the second idea says the same feeling from the inside does not make sense.  

Each answer is a true thinking help, and the strange thing is the strong thing that moves them.

question: material conditional, modus_ponens — deontological
expected_answer:

We can show this fact as a simple idea: if the first part is true then the second part is true. The first part is the words that a person said they will do something. This move makes sense in any way of looking at the idea, as long as the first part can not be not true while the second part is true. It is good to note that the simple idea only shows the small shape of the thought about need. A full look at the thoughts of a person who wrote about need would say that the need to keep a word is a need that has no ways out. The simple idea does not talk about how strong the idea feels; it only says that both parts can not be true and not true at the same time. For what we need now, this smaller view is enough to show the move that makes sense, even if it does not show all things a person who thinks about need would want to say about the power of a word.

question: abstraction analogy (argumentative) — allegory
expected_answer:
A story that shows a picture of another thing has never only been just a nice same look. When it is most serious it is a kind of talk: by putting a second thing onto a story picture, the story lets us show ideas about that second thing by the way the story moves instead of by straight saying, and the showing has a strong push that straight saying does not. That is why a story about power works as a talk instead of just a picture.

When the place where the animals live change a set of words that tell what to do, the change is not only a story part that makes us think of bad lies; it is a showing that the way the place where the animals live is set up – the animals hold on reading and on the past – always makes that end happen no matter what the first big ideas were.

The story shows an idea about how the place where the animals live works: if the place is set up this way, this is what will happen, and what will happen is what people tried to stop.

A different story works the same way: the main person meets a person who knows and a quick way, and those meetings show, by the way the travel goes, that certain things that can hurt in the world often hurt the end, and the idea is shown by the story steps instead of by a talk from a part.

The idea we get from these parts is: find the ways the group works, put them into story people or places, and let the story show what will happen because of the way the group is set up, not because of one person choice.

When we put this idea into a book about a future world, the idea shows exactly why the book works as a talk instead of just a notice.

The world in the book is not mostly a guess about the future or a bad night; it is a talk that the parts of a strong set of words that tell what to do about who can have babies, old books, the need for money, are set up in a way that, when put together, make things happen the same way the place where the animals live set of words that tell what to do change did.

The talk is in the way the story is made, not in any clear saying, and that is why the book stays strong in its talk even for readers who do not share the person who made the book big ideas about power: the story picture shows the way the group works as a set up, not as other choice, and the story steps show instead of just say.

question: anomaly analogy (explanatory) — metaphor
expected_answer: When people who teach writing reach for a way that says "attention is money," they are taking the thinking idea of one of the most deep ideas in the language we use: "time is money." That taking feels normal because attention, like time, is a thing people who read have in a small lot, and not careful writing can use it up. The same shows at least a few good ideas — use the attention of the people who read with care, do not use it on things that are not needed, put it in the parts that are important — and these ideas have real power. The trouble comes when the way is used a lot as a way to tell why things work instead of as a simple idea to help. Money works as a shape for thought because it is counted in set pieces: a piece of money spent is a piece gone, the numbers are right, and the step from spending to taking away is clear. Attention does not have that kind of counting. There is no piece to tell if a hard line takes more attention than a long going away from the main point, and without that piece the idea of a small thing cannot give good help. Also, the fact that you can not get money back does not work for reading: a person who stops the line can read again, look quickly, or come back later. The not a lot shape the person who teaches wants to bring does not move whole. The way shows a real thing — that not careful writing takes away things — without showing how to count or think about those things, which is the job the way was used to do.

question: strict conditional, affirming_consequent — perceptual
expected_answer:
Skin doctor work with what they see on the skin. To know about a spot on skin the doctor must look at the spot with enough light and pay close attention. If a doctor says they know about a spot then they must have looked at the spot with enough light and paid close attention. There is no way a doctor can say they know about a spot if they can not look at it or only look quick or look with light that is not bright enough to see the spot well.

A skin doctor at a place that looks at dark spots on skin saw a new person who had a different dark spot on the left arm. The doctor stood at the right distance, turned a bright white light toward the spot and spent a few minutes looking at the spot slow, writing notes about what they saw as they went. The doctor looked at the spot with enough light and paid close attention. Another person then said that the doctor must know about the spot. This is a bad thought that says because the doctor knows the spot the doctor must have looked at it with enough light. The line only says that looking with enough light is needed to know, not that it is enough. Whether the doctor really knows about the spot also is made on other things: how good the doctor is at reading the color of the spot, if there are other things that hide the spot, and how the doctor thinks about the different kinds of spots. Those things are not certain by just the light and looking.

question: literal_similarity analogy (heuristic) — philosophy_of_mind
expected_answer:
The way of looking at what people say about what they feel in their mind gives a group of ideas for studying mind that moves between two parts that are not good: thinking that first person words are a clear important look of very true felt things, and ignoring them as more sound that does not matter for looking at mind.  

This way looks at words as things – as many small things that show what it seems like to people that they feel – and asks the ideas to tell why people make those words, what they show about how the head works, and how they are about the body and working parts that make up a person mind life.  

The idea that the first person words are very important stays, because the words are needed many small things, but the thought that they are always very true is put on hold, because we do not take the words as they look as a clear look of a very true felt fact.  

The study of talk and things that a person does that help people who are sad shows this way in real world study with clear things that happen.  

When people fill out a set of words about feeling sad, their own words are the main many small things for the study.  

But the people who study this do not think a number like 17 on a set of words about sad is a clear look of a very true inside feeling; they think it is a sign of how a person does, and they check how often it is the same, how true it is, and how much it moves when they try to help.  

The question the person who studies asks is not just what people say they feel but also when they say it, how the set of words works, and what changes in the way people give words happen when they get some help.  

The big idea is to find out why the mind makes the words it does, not to think the words are a clear look into a not seen inside place that must be taken as true without question.  

Putting the two cases together helps make this way easy to see as a clear plan of a big set of very careful real work, which is good for students who might think this way is a deep not sure about mind instead of a normal way of looking at how words and inside feeling fit.

question: analogy_proper analogy (explanatory) — epistemology
expected_answer:
The idea of picking the most good guess about why something happened is in a place where people do not all agree today: many people use it a lot when they think about how the world works, and many think it is a right way to think about what we know, but the reason why it works in a very hard number way or a way that all parts fit together is still talked about.  

A story taken from a law person thinking helps show the form of this idea about picking a guess with clear look.  

When a good law person builds a story from signs that are not big by them, the way of thinking is one of many signs coming together: many different signs – a foot mark, a money reason, a story that does not fit, a piece that is the same, a picture time mark – none of which alone tells the whole, are each made make sense by one guess about what went on.  

The coming together is big for what we know because the signs are different: if the guess is not true, the chance that all these different signs would happen at the same time is low.  

The more different signs come together, the more sure we can say that the guess that fits them best is right.  

This is the idea of picking the most good guess about why something happened in its clear form, and the law story shows its way by putting it in a known story way.  

The same form is under the way people think about how the world works in cases where many ideas come together.  

The idea that tiny parts make up things was shown not by one try but by many different things coming together – tiny moving parts, a same form of parts, a light line set, how air works when pushed – each of which the idea made make sense of and none of which alone told the whole.  

The idea about how living things change was shown by many signs coming together from old bones, where living things live, looking at body parts side by side, and tries of how people raise animals.  

In each story, the power of the idea comes from the many and different things it puts together instead of from the power of any one sign.  

The law story shows why this way of thinking is a good way for what we know and why many signs that come together can give a more good reason than one sign that is alone.

question: analogy_proper analogy (explanatory) — cooking_and_craft
expected_answer:
When a person who makes food from a ground thing that grows and water talks about letting the together stuff rise, they are really talking about making a place where a small life thing can do its work and keep that work. The small life thing is already there; the person job is to give it the heat and water in the air it needs to break down food, and to trust the part that is not hard to hold the air the small life thing makes. Put the together stuff in a very cold place and the work moves very slowly. Put it in a very hot place and you kill the small life thing that does the work. Do it right and the whole together stuff gets bigger, you can see it, in about one hour.  

That whole thing – the person, the place, the heat and water in the air, the growing – looks a lot like what a good person who helps does when a group of people talk together to make new thoughts. The people are the small life things: they already have the thoughts you want. Your work is not to make the thoughts yourself but to keep the heat and water in the air right so that people feel safe enough to show them, and to give a way of talking that holds and joins what is said instead of letting it go away.  

If there is too much force in the room, people stop talking; if there is too little way to hold the talk, thoughts fly by and are not caught. Make the feeling in the room right and the place for thoughts gets bigger that you can see, in a way that feels like a real thing.  

This idea is good because it moves the look from what the thoughts are to the heat and water in the air that let them appear, and that is where the person who helps really has power. It also gives a good sign: even a perfect rise can be broken if you guess the wrong time to stop.  

If a talk is kept open too long, past the point where the thoughts grow well, it starts to fall down under its own weight like the food that has risen too much and then loses its shape.

question: indicative conditional, modus_ponens — predicate
expected_answer:

This can be put as an if then: if a written thing that talks about each thing is true for all things, then that written thing can be shown using the simple steps of the old simple system. The if then goes from meaning to writing, and that is the hard part. question: probabilistic conditional, modus_ponens — child_rearing
expected_answer:
There is a kind of change that many people see that often works in how young people who read move through the steps of books for kids, and it is good to see it not as a tall thing that kids climb at set ages but as a step by step change that comes from the more they have read as well as how old they are.  

The kid who has been reading by them for two or more years — reading by choice, reading for fun, reading long enough times to really finish books and come back for more — makes a strong want for story that the first short books stop making happy.  

First short books are made to help new readers who read by them: short parts, few people, easy to guess story lines, things that end fast.  

For a kid with two years of reading by them behind them, those parts stop being help and start feeling slow. The story line is too easy, the parts too short, the end too sure too fast.  

What they want — what they are ready for — is a story line that needs them to keep things in mind over many parts, people who have inside thoughts that make the story more hard, problems that need a real path to end.  

That is the place that books for older kids fill.  

Our boy has been reading by himself since six, taking books and finishing them and asking for the next one, and he is now eight. Two whole years of easy reading by himself for fun.  

The same idea works for him. He will probably have already grown out of the first short books now, even if we keep getting them, and he will probably like more the kind of story and people that books for older kids with doing or make believe give.  

We should change our book place choices in that way.
